title: Measure Ruler: Persist and Share Pinned Rulers

files.name: chart.js
index.html
files.code:
Turn on Measure and drag A to B, then share or undo
Draw one or more rulers, then Copy shareable link (chart.perspectives.toURL()): the rulers travel in the #apex= URL fragment alongside the zoom window, so opening that link elsewhere restores the exact drawing on load via ApexCharts.perspectives.fromURL(). Because chart.history.enabled is on, every pin is an undo step: Undo / Redo (or Ctrl+Z) steps through them. Pins are stored in data coordinates, so a restored ruler re-projects at whatever zoom the view lands in.
